text.title: REST API Design Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated api-rest-design artefact.

step.name: normalize-paths
step.action: Convert singular to plural; eliminate verbs from path; identify nested resources (`/orders/{id}/items`).

step.name: assign-methods
step.action: Pick verb per operation: list=GET, create=POST, full-replace=PUT, partial=PATCH, remove=DELETE; mark idempotent set.

step.name: map-status-codes
step.action: Pick RFC 9110 codes per outcome; document in OpenAPI; align with ERR-* catalogue.

step.name: add-idempotency-and-hateoas
step.input: Operations with side effects + stateful resources
step.action: Add Idempotency-Key support to monetary/external POSTs; expose `_links` on stateful resources.
step.decision-gate: any resource with monetary POST lacking idempotency_key=true → verdict=fail.
